visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Characters & Micro-Actions: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a black sleeveless top, a white lace skirt, and a dark blue beret, is the central figure in a Costco warehouse. She stands behind a shopping cart, holding a black plastic tray containing three large sandwiches. She exhibits high-energy facial expressions, smiling widely, speaking enthusiastically to the camera, and gesturing with her hands to emphasize the product. Object Specifications: The sandwiches are long bread rolls overflowing with white crab salad, topped with a generous layer of bright orange fish roe and drizzled with white sauce. The packaging is a standard black plastic base with a clear lid and a white Costco price label. Setting & Contextual Background: The setting is a large, brightly lit Costco supermarket aisle. In the background, refrigerated shelves filled with packaged food items are visible, along with other shoppers pushing carts and blurred store infrastructure. Physical Text Presence: A large Costco logo is permanently overlaid at the top, along with colorful variety text reading 美味豪華 蟹肉沙拉堡 and 一個160元!? in stylized bubbles. (2) Characters & Micro-Actions: The scene shifts to an indoor setting where two women are seated at a table. The woman from the first phase is on the right, and a second woman with long black hair and long red tassel earrings is on the left. They interact with a half-eaten sandwich, pointing at specific layers of crab meat and vegetables. They use hand gestures like a thumbs up and OK sign to signal approval. Their expressions are exaggerated for comedic and positive effect. Object Specifications: The Crab Salad Sandwich is shown in a tight close-up, revealing its cross-section with thick layers of shredded cabbage, crab meat, and small diced apple pieces mixed in a creamy sauce. They are served on a purple tray with red side plates. Setting & Contextual Background: The background is a cozy, brightly lit indoor home environment, possibly a kitchen or living room, with yellow plush toys and shelves visible behind them. Physical Text Presence: Overlays continue with phrases like 美味豪華 蟹肉沙拉堡 and 超推 appearing in vibrant, animated fonts to punctuate their review points.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Variety]: 美味豪華 蟹肉沙拉堡. [Slogan]: 一個160元!?. (2) [Slogan]: 751元. (3) [Slogan]: 一個160元. (4) [Variety]: 爆發式的醬料. (5) [Slogan]: 一個160元. (6) [Variety]: 值不值得?. (7) [Slogan]: 一個160.... (8) [Variety]: 美味豪華 蟹肉沙拉堡. (9) [Slogan]: 160元真的不貴. (10) [Slogan]: 非常划算. (11) [Slogan]: 超推. [Variety]: 超推.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female reviewers, 1 male shopper in background, 1 female shopper in background
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: Main character 1: Female with long dark hair, wearing a black top and a blue beret. Main character 2: Female with long dark hair and large red tassel earrings.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a Costco supermarket with refrigerated food aisles and shoppers. Second scene is a domestic indoor setting with soft toys and home lighting.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Vocals & Prosody: A high-pitched, energetic female voice delivers a fast-paced introduction. Her speech rate is high, and her tone is very enthusiastic with frequent rising intonations. Music & Tonality: The background music is an upbeat, high-tempo electronic pop track (~128 BPM) in a bright major mode. The beat is strong and repetitive, driving a sense of urgency and fun. Ambient Sound: A low-level hum of a commercial retail environment is audible under the music. SFX: None in this initial second. (2) Vocals & Prosody: Narration continues at a high volume and fast rate. Music & Tonality: The upbeat BGM persists with no change in texture. Ambient Sound: Standard indoor room tone. SFX: A sharp ding or bell-like sound effect occurs at the 4-second mark, precisely synchronized with the appearance of a price graphic on the screen, adding emphasis to the cost. (3) Vocals & Prosody: The speaker's voice becomes more emphatic as she discusses the weight. Music & Tonality: BGM remains consistent. Ambient Sound: Minimal background noise. SFX: A brief, high-frequency whoosh sound effect plays during a fast camera zoom-in transition on the sandwich label, enhancing the auditory and visual dynamism. (4) Vocals & Prosody: Two female voices are now heard, laughing and making sounds of approval such as Wow and Mmm. Their pitch is high and arousal is very positive. Music & Tonality: The same high-energy BGM continues to play throughout. Ambient Sound: Quiet indoor setting. SFX: A sparkle or magic-style sound effect is used when star graphics appear on screen, followed by a percussive hit SFX as the final recommendation text is displayed.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: List-based: Hook -> Price Comparison -> Ingredient Breakdown -> Final Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To review a specific Costco Crab Salad Sandwich by showing its price and ingredients in-store and providing a tasting reaction in a home setting. The video aims to convince the audience of the product's value and quality through high-energy presentation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Direct display of product packaging, price, and enthusiastic recommendation within a Costco store.

high_inference.freeDescribe: A fast-paced, high-arousal social media food review with heavy use of variety-style text overlays and sound effects to maintain viewer engagement.
